pages.raw_text:
NOTICE To FHOFGHTY OWNERS.


Notice Is hereby given that the as
sessment roll for the Improvement by
the paving of Monroe street. from a
line 113.3 feet south of the south line
of Bridge avenue to the south line
of Mallon avenue, is now on file In
the Office of the city clerk. Said roll
was filed on the End day of June,
1903. and is now open for public in
spectiop.


The city council will meet on the
7th day of July. 1908. at the hour of
1880 p. m, of said day, at which said
meeting the city council will hear
and consider appeals from and objec-
tons to said assessment roll by
parties .aggrieyed BY said assessment.


G. A. FLEMING. City Clerk.


Spokane, Wash. Iune 9, 1908.


Bids will be received until noon.
Works for the grading, curbing and
separate bids for sidewalking with
cement Sinto avenue, from Dakota
to Columbus streets. in accordance
with the plans and specifications on
file In this Office. Bids opened at 2
o'clock same date.


L. B. HANDLEY. Secretary.
